title: ToolTreaux 16oz Texturizing Dual Face Jewelry Hammer Wooden Handle 10.25 Inch
description:
The ToolTreaux jewelry-making hammer features 2 different hammer head faces - square pattern and stripe pattern. This dual-faced hammer provides a variety of uses for jewelry making and other metalworking projects. This hammer features an ergonomic, non-slip wooden handle that helps prevent injury during use. It’s easy to use, provides precision striking for small and intricate pieces, ideal for jewelry making. The hammer weighs just 16 ounces and measures 10.25 inches. Although the ToolTreaux texturizing hammer was originally designed for jewelry making, this versatile precision tool is also great for watchmaking and metalworking. You can count on it to work safely with metal, brass, copper, silver, and all types of soft precious metals.
